Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Furman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Furman is a man who accompanies Nathanael Bareius and uses a writing-board.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Furman is Bareius's servant.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Furman is an alchemist who looks exactly like Bareius.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Furman is Bareius's assistant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Furman is an assistant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Furman leads the alchemists alongside Bareius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Furman is an assistant to Nathanael Bareius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Furman was responsible for activating Shera's people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Furman is Bareius's assistant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Furman is Bareius's duplicate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Furman is Bareius's assistant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Furman is a Mason.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
